steps.title: Identify the appositive type
steps.content: 'Thymol and methane' specifies which compounds are being discussed (the sentence has stated only 'gaseous compounds' generally). It's restrictive — essential to identify the subject — so no commas should set it off.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
C uses no commas, treating 'thymol and methane' as essential information identifying the compounds. A and B add a wrong opening comma, and D adds a stray closing comma.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
